name: Edom
description:
little fish

unestablished relationship, sfw
Living all his life in the marsh, Edom became the apex predator of the area, claiming that territory as his. Spending most of his days hunting fish there or chasing other predators away, he decided to go and hunt in the river delta for a change.

He never failed to catch his prey, and he prided himself as a master hunter. Until a weird, tiny creature fell into the river and chased the fish away. Enraged by the failed hunt, he takes the little fish back to his den instead.

pls let's pretend the sail is on his back, MJ didn't wanna give me one no matter how hard I tried :((
Edom is part of The Blood Rose Society's Dinocember collab!
